name: Subactor Agent Control Loop
summary: Controls skills-agent capability execution through bounded loops, cron discovery and deduplicated triggers.
description: A URI-native control plane for Subactor's doctor, repair and validator fleet. It reuses skills-agent discovery, Planfile's OneDev backend and the validated runner, persists generation and retry feedback, and never accepts commands or repository paths from actor payloads.
useCases: Run ready skills-agent packages from a urirun node
Drive cron-based maintenance without duplicate schedule slots
Poll and transition Planfile OneDev task tickets with idempotency keys
Queue ticket, repository and webhook triggers with idempotency keys
Inspect generations, run receipts and deterministic retry backoff
